form.formComment: Has been consistent, placing at his last 4 starts. Latest effort finished 2nd over 340m at this track beaten 1.75 lengths (19.46) behind Airflow Betty in a Grade 5 on March 31. Overdue and expected to feature again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th on March 31 over 472m at this track behind Don't Brew It beaten 5.5 lengths (26.75) in a Grade 5. Expected to go very well.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors at big odds two back when third (22.55) over 400m at this track. Has a low draw and is worth plenty of thought.

form.formComment: Narrowly beaten last time at Richmond Straight when only half a length from the winner but did record a dynamic 17.52 over the 324m journey. Can sneak a place again.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 457m at Temora. Hard to recommend this time.
